#REDIRECT [[The Beatles]]
The Beatles started in Liverpool, England. Composed of George Harrison, Paul McCartney, Ringo Star, and John Lennin. In a short while the Beatles gained popularity and became well know throughout England. They travled to different countries, mainly America. In 1970 the band brocke up and each member did a short solo career. The only living Beatles today are Paul McCartney and Ringo Star. George Harrison Died of cancer a while back and John Lennon was shot.
Paul McCartney is still a well known song artist, but Ring settled down.

#REDIRECT [[The Beatles]]The Beatles, comprised of John Lennon, Ringo Starr[Richard Starkey], Paul Mcartney and George Harrison was one of the most influential bands of all time and undoubtedly the fathers of Rock n' Roll. They all eventually came together after playing with several different bands and started to write their pop/rock music that shocked the world and eventually turned into beatlemania which eventually got so bad that the Beatles could not go out in public at all or they would be grabbed a hold of by mobs of fans and be stripped bare because fans just wanted a piece of their clothing or to touch them.--[[User:71.34.102.66|71.34.102.66]] 07:17, 10 March 2007 (UTC)

#REDIRECT [[The Beatles]]
The Beatles are probably considered the greatest rock/pop group of all time.

#REDIRECT [[The Beatles]]
The Beatles are considered the greatest rock/pop group of all time. There is no band in pop or rock history that, in such a short time, changed rock and roll and brought so many styles and innovations. Still, almost 40 years after their break up, they still are considered one main influece for many serous rock and roll bands.

The Beatles are probably the most popular band.  They were from Liverpool, and their first album produced was "Meet the Beatles,"  and their last was "Let it Be."

The beatles were a classic rock group that formed in the late 1950's. The group held 17 number 1's on the Uk record chart stretching up tp 1967. The band had four members. john lennon, Paul mc'cartney, George harrison and Ringo starr. john lennon played guitar and vocals while Paul mc'cartney and George harrison switched roles of guitar and bass although Paul mc'cartney usually played bass and, of course Ringo starr the drummer.
